/usr/lib64/ccache/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wno-unused-parameter -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/guanaco_example.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/guanaco_example.dir/examples/guanaco_example.cpp.o -o guanaco_example  -Wl,-rpath,/home/atomic-germ/Projects/Guanaco/guanaco/build:/home/atomic-germ/Projects/Guanaco/llama.cpp/build/bin libguanaco.so /home/atomic-germ/Projects/Guanaco/llama.cpp/build/bin/libggml.so /home/atomic-germ/Projects/Guanaco/llama.cpp/build/bin/libllama.so /usr/lib64/librt.a
